Year.description: Year in which the production entry was made.

Month.description: Month in which the production entry was made.

Machine Utilization (%).description: Machine utilization in percentage, typically denotes how much time the machine was utilized in a shift.

Machine Downtime (hours).description: Machine downtime, typically indicates how much time of the shift the machine was down.

Machine Age (years).description: Age of the machine in years.

Batch Quality (Pass %).description: Percentage of total produce that passed quality checks.

Cycle Time (minutes).description: Indicates the cycle time in which the batch was completed.

Energy Consumption (kWh).description: Total energy consumed by the machine in a particular shift.

CO2 Emissions (kg).description: CO2 emissions caused by the machine.

Emission Limit Compliance.description: Compliance level to the set norm of emissions.

Waste Generated (kg).description: Total waste generated during the shift.

Water Usage (liters).description: Total water usage in the shift.

Shift.description: Shift indicator in which the machine was operating.

Operator Experience (years).description: Operator experience, indicating how many years the operator has worked on machines.

Team Size.description: Team size in which the operator operated the machine.

Operator Training Level.description: Operator training index corresponding to Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced.

Absenteeism Rate (%).description: Percentage of time the operator was away from the machine.

Product Category.description: Product category indicator indicating foam grade A, B, or Custom Size.

Supplier.description: Supplier Id indicator - Indicating Supplier A, B, or C.

Supplier Delays (days).description: Supplier delays, indicating how much time raw material was delayed in days.

Raw Material Quality.description: Raw materials' quality identifier supplied by the Supplier: High, Medium, or Low.

Cost of Downtime ($).description: Cost of downtime, indicating the cost of machine downtime or operator absenteeism.

Revenue ($).description: Revenue generated by the factory in dollars.

Profit Margin (%).description: Profit margin reported as a percentage of revenue.

Breakdowns (count).description: Count of breakdowns in the machine.

Safety Incidents (count).description: Number of safety incidents that occurred.

Defect Root Cause.description: Defect root cause indicator indicating defect categories: Material Impurity, Assembly Errors, Internal Defects, Surface Defects, or None.

Production Volume (units).description: Production volume generated in a particular shift, measured in units.

Defect Rate (%).description: Defect rate in a particular shift.

Foam Density.description: Foam density output generated by the machine.

Sales Data.description: Sales data, i.e., sales done for this batch.
